title: Create: Roots & Rotors
description: A lightweight Create Mod modpack focused on smooth performance and creativity — designed to enhance automation, engineering, and building without overwhelming your system.
body:
# Create: Roots & Rotors

A lightweight Create Mod SMP modpack that blends nature, exploration, and mechanical innovation. 

Build sprawling factories among the roots of the earth, send machines soaring with rotors above the skies, and craft a seamless world of automation, adventure, and creativity.

### Mods & Cores

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- [Create Mod, 6.0.8](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create: Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco)
- [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
- [Corpse](https://modrinth.com/mod/corpse)
- [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Jade Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-forge)
- [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- [Simple Storage Network](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-storage-network)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks)
- [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)

- [Zeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/zeta)
- [Sophisticated Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-core)
- [FLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/flib)
- [Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib)

</details>



**all optimized for smooth multiplayer performance.**
